title: Prompt Injection Explained Simply
summary: Why model instructions can be manipulated through untrusted content and how to reduce that risk.

title: Unsafe Tool Calling
summary: Agent tool access without constraints can turn harmless prompts into real operational damage.

title: Excessive Agent Permissions
summary: Overpowered agents increase blast radius. Permission boundaries are a product requirement, not an afterthought.

title: Data Leakage Through Prompts
summary: Sensitive data can leak into prompts, logs, and outputs unless your pipeline explicitly prevents it.

title: Unsafe Browsing Agents
summary: Agents that browse external sites can be steered by hostile pages unless tightly sandboxed.

title: AI-Generated Scam Content
summary: AI makes high-quality scam copy and impersonation cheaper; defense now depends on verification workflows.
